description.para: Block size mask for 512 bytes - This is the default block size.

sectiondef.header: SD High Speed mode configuration options

briefdescription.para: User configuration option to enable or disable SD HS mode.

detaileddescription.para: By default SD HS mode is disabled for Versal and enabled for other platforms.

memberdef.name: XSdPs_ConfigTable
memberdef.initializer: = { { XPAR_XSDPS_0_DEVICE_ID, XPAR_XSDPS_0_BASEADDR, XPAR_XSDPS_0_SDIO_CLK_FREQ_HZ, XPAR_XSDPS_0_HAS_CD, XPAR_XSDPS_0_HAS_WP, XPAR_XSDPS_0_BUS_WIDTH, XPAR_XSDPS_0_MIO_BANK, XPAR_XSDPS_0_HAS_EMIO, XPAR_XSDPS_0_SLOT_TYPE, XPAR_XSDPS_0_IS_CACHE_COHERENT, XPAR_XSDPS_0_CLK_50_SDR_ITAP_DLY, XPAR_XSDPS_0_CLK_50_SDR_OTAP_DLY, XPAR_XSDPS_0_CLK_50_DDR_ITAP_DLY, XPAR_XSDPS_0_CLK_50_DDR_OTAP_DLY, XPAR_XSDPS_0_CLK_100_SDR_OTAP_DLY, XPAR_XSDPS_0_CLK_200_SDR_OTAP_DLY, XPAR_XSDPS_0_CLK_200_DDR_OTAP_DLY } }

briefdescription.para: Initializes a specific XSdPs instance so that the driver is ready to use.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XSdPs instance.
Reference to a structure containing information about a specific SD device. This function initializes an InstancePtr object for a specific device specified by the contents of Configuration.

Device base address in the virtual memory address space. The caller is responsible for keeping the address mapping from EffectiveAddr to the device physical base address unchanged once this function is invoked. Unexpected errors may occur if the address mapping changes after this function is called. If address translation is not used, use ConfigPtr->Config. BaseAddress for this device.

listitem.para: XST_DEVICE_IS_STARTED if the device is already started. It must be stopped to re-initialize.

simplesect.para: This function initializes the host controller. Initial clock of 400 KHz is set. Voltage of 3.3 V is selected as that is supported by host. Interrupts status is enabled and signal disabled by default. Default data direction is card to host and 32 bit ADMA2 is selected. Default Block size is 512 bytes.

briefdescription.para: Initializes Card with Identification mode sequence.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if failure - could be because a) SD is already initialized b) There is no card inserted c) One of the steps (commands) in the initialization cycle failed

briefdescription.para: Performs SD read in polled mode.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Address passed by the user that is to be sent as argument along with the command.
Block count passed by the user.
Pointer to the data buffer for a DMA transfer.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if failure - could be because another transfer is in progress or command or data inhibit is set

memberdef.argsstring: (XSdPs *InstancePtr, u32 Arg, u32 BlkCnt, const u8 *Buff)
memberdef.name: XSdPs_WritePolled

briefdescription.para: Performs SD write in polled mode.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Address passed by the user that is to be sent as argument along with the command.
Block count passed by the user.
Pointer to the data buffer for a DMA transfer.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if failure - could be because another transfer is in progress or command or data inhibit is set

briefdescription.para: API to idle the SDIO Interface.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XSdPs instance.

briefdescription.para: Performs Erase operation on the given address range.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Address of the first write block to be erased.
Address of the last write block of the continuous range to be erased.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if failure - could be because another transfer is in progress or card not present or erase operation failure.

briefdescription.para: Performs Sanitize operation on the unmapped user address range.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if failure - could be because another transfer is in progress or card not present or Sanitize operation failure.

briefdescription.para: Looks up the device configuration based on the unique device ID/BaseAddress.

detaileddescription.para: The XSdPs_ConfigTable[] contains the configuration info for each device in the system.

parameterdescription.para: contains the base address of the device

simplesect.para: A pointer to the configuration found or NULL if the specified device ID/BaseAddress was not found. See xsdps.h for the definition of XSdPs_Config.
In XSCT/classic flow, DeviceId is used to look up the device configuration.

briefdescription.para: Sets high speed in card and host.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XSdPs instance.

briefdescription.para: API to change clock frequency to a given value.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XSdPs instance.
Clock frequency in Hz.

simplesect.para: This API will change clock frequency to the value less than or equal to the given value using the permissible dividers.

briefdescription.para: Sends pullup command to card before using DAT line 3(using 4-bit bus).

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XSdPs instance.

briefdescription.para: Gets bus width support by card.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XSdPs instance.
Buffer to store SCR register returned by card.

briefdescription.para: Sets bus width to 4-bit in card and host.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XSdPs instance.

briefdescription.para: Gets bus speed supported by card.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XSdPs instance.
Buffer to store function group support data returned by card.
Pointer to the XSdPs instance.
Buffer to store EXT_CSD
Pointer to the XSdPs instance.
Argument to be sent along with the command.

briefdescription.para: Updates Block size for read/write operations.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Block size passed by the user.
Pointer to the XSdPs instance.
Buffer to store status data returned by card.

briefdescription.para: Selects card and sets default block size.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XSdPs instance.

briefdescription.para: Performs SD read in polled mode.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Address passed by the user that is to be sent as argument along with the command.
Block count passed by the user.
Pointer to the data buffer for a DMA transfer.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if Transfer initialization was successful
XST_FAILURE if failure - could be because another transfer is in progress or command or data inhibit is set

briefdescription.para: Checks if the transfer is completed successfully.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.

listitem.para: XST_DEVICE_BUSY - if the transfer is still in progress

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Address passed by the user that is to be sent as argument along with the command.
Block count passed by the user.
Pointer to the data buffer for a DMA transfer.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if Transfer initialization was successful
XST_FAILURE if failure - could be because another transfer is in progress or command or data inhibit is set

briefdescription.para: Checks for the write transfer completed.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.

listitem.para: XST_DEVICE_BUSY - if the transfer is still in progress

briefdescription.para: Performs SD read in polled mode.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Address passed by the user that is to be sent as argument along with the command.
- Block count passed by the user.
- Pointer to the data buffer for a DMA transfer.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if failure - could be because another transfer is in progress or command or data inhibit is set

memberdef.argsstring: (XSdPs *InstancePtr, u32 Arg, u32 BlkCnt, const u8 *Buff)
memberdef.name: XSdPs_Write

briefdescription.para: Performs SD write in polled mode.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Address passed by the user that is to be sent as argument along with the command.
- Block count passed by the user.
- Pointer to the data buffer for a DMA transfer.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if failure - could be because another transfer is in progress or command or data inhibit is set

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.

listitem.para: XST_DEVICE_BUSY - if the transfer is still in progress

briefdescription.para: Identifies type of card using CMD0 + CMD1 sequence.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XSdPs instance.
Pointer to the instance to be worked on.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if failure - could be because a) SD is already initialized b) There is no card inserted c) One of the steps (commands) in the initialization cycle failed

simplesect.para: This function initializes the SD card by following its initialization and identification state diagram. CMD0 is sent to reset card. CMD8 and ACDM41 are sent to identify voltage and high capacity support CMD2 and CMD3 are sent to obtain Card ID and Relative card address respectively. CMD9 is sent to read the card specific data.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if failure - could be because a) MMC is already initialized b) There is no card inserted c) One of the steps (commands) in the initialization cycle failed

simplesect.para: This function initializes the SD card by following its initialization and identification state diagram. CMD0 is sent to reset card. CMD1 sent to identify voltage and high capacity support CMD2 and CMD3 are sent to obtain Card ID and Relative card address respectively. CMD9 is sent to read the card specific data.

briefdescription.para: Checks if the card is present or not.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: Sends CMD0 to reset the card.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: Sends command to get the card interface details.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: Sends command to get the card operating condition.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Pointer to the instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: Gets the CSD register from the card.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: Sets the card voltage to 1.8 V.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Pointer to the instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: Checks for Reset Done bits to be cleared after a reset assert.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Bits to be checked to be cleared.
Pointer to the instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: Check if the CMD and DAT buses are high.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: API to Identify the supported UHS mode.

detaileddescription.para: This API will assign the corresponding tap delay API to the Config_TapDelay pointer based on the supported bus speed.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XSdPs instance.
Contains the response for CMD6

briefdescription.para: API to set Tap Delay with respect to the speed modes.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XSdPs instance.
Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Pointer to the instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to do the Auto tuning.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: API to setup ADMA2 descriptor table.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XSdPs instance.
Block count.
Pointer to data buffer.

briefdescription.para: API to setup ADMA2 descriptor table for 64 Bit DMA.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XSdPs instance.
Block count.
Pointer to the XSdPs instance.
Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Extended CSD register from the card.
Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Extended CSD register from the card.

briefdescription.para: Sets the clock to the passed frequency.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Selected frequency

briefdescription.para: Checks if the voltage is set to 1.8 V or not.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Address passed by the user that is to be sent as argument along with the command.
- Block count passed by the user.

briefdescription.para: Initiates the Cmd transfer to SD card.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Command to be sent

briefdescription.para: Sets the address of the first write block to be erased.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Address of the first write block.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if Set start Address is successful
XST_FAILURE if failure - could be because failed to set EndAddr.

briefdescription.para: Sets the address of the last write block to be erased.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Address of the last write block.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if Set End Address is successful.
XST_FAILURE if failure - could be because failed to set EndAddr.

briefdescription.para: Sends Erase command to the device and wait for transfer complete.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if erase operation is successful
XST_FAILURE if failure - could be because erase operation failed.

briefdescription.para: Sets the tap delay for SDR104 uhs mode.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: Sets the tap delay for SDR50 uhs mode.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: Sets the tap delay for DDR50 uhs mode.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: Sets the tap delay for SDR25 uhs mode.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: Switches the SD card voltage from 3v3 to 1v8.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XSdPs instance.

briefdescription.para: Initiates the transfer to or from SD card.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Type of reset

briefdescription.para: Sets bit to start execution of tuning.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Pointer to the instance to be worked on.

Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Clock value to be set.
Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Argument to be sent along with the command. This could be address or any other information

briefdescription.para: This function is used to do the DMA transfer to or from SD card.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Block count passed by the user.
Block size passed by the user.
Pointer to the data buffer for a DMA transfer.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if failure - could be because another transfer is in progress or command or data inhibit is set

briefdescription.para: This function is used to do the DMA transfer to or from SD card.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Block count passed by the user.
Block size passed by the user.
Pointer to the data buffer for a DMA transfer.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XSdPs instance.

simplesect.para: This API is specific to ZynqMP platform.

Pointer to the instance to be worked on.

memberdef.argsstring: (XSdPs *InstancePtr, u32 Cmd, u32 Arg, u32 BlkCnt)
memberdef.name: XSdPs_CmdTransfer

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Command to be sent.
Argument to be sent along with the command. This could be address or any other information
Block count passed by the user.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if failure - could be because another transfer is in progress or command or data inhibit is set

briefdescription.para: Checks if the transfer is completed successfully.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: Checks if the CMD/DATA bus is idle or not.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Value to be selected Cmd bus or Dat bus.

briefdescription.para: This function frames the Command register for a particular command.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Command to be sent.

simplesect.para: Command register value complete with response type and data, CRC and index related flags.

This generates only the command register value i.e. the upper 16 bits of the transfer mode and command register. This value is already shifted to be upper 16 bits and can be directly OR'ed with transfer mode register value.

briefdescription.para: Enable eMMC HS400 mode for Versal Net platform.
Contains the interface functions of the XSdPs driver.

detaileddescription.para: The file contains the implementation of the static initialization functionality of the XSdPs component.
The xsdps_options.c file contains APIs for changing the various options in host and card.
The xsdps_host.c file contains the interface functions of the XSdPs driver.
The xsdps_g.c file contains a configuration table that specifies the configuration of SD devices in the system.
The xsdps_core.h header file contains the identifiers and basic hardware access driver functions (or macros) that can be used to access the device.
The xsdps_card.c file contains the interface functions of the XSdPs driver.
See xsdps.h for a detailed description of the device and driver.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00a hk/sg 10/17/13 Initial release 2.0 hk 12/13/13 Added check for arm to use sleep.h and its API's 2.1 hk 04/18/14 Add sleep for microblaze designs. CR# 781117. 2.2 hk 07/28/14 Make changes to enable use of data cache. 2.3 sk 09/23/14 Send command for relative card address when re-initialization is done.CR# 819614. Use XSdPs_Change_ClkFreq API whenever changing clock.CR# 816586. 2.4 sk 12/04/14 Added support for micro SD without WP/CD. CR# 810655. Checked for DAT Inhibit mask instead of CMD Inhibit mask in Cmd Transfer API. Added Support for SD Card v1.0 2.5 sg 07/09/15 Added SD 3.0 features kvn 07/15/15 Modified the code according to MISRAC-2012. 2.6 sk 10/12/15 Added support for SD card v1.0 CR# 840601. 2.7 sk 11/24/15 Considered the slot type befoe checking CD/WP pins. sk 12/10/15 Added support for MMC cards. sk 02/16/16 Corrected the Tuning logic. sk 03/01/16 Removed Bus Width check for eMMC. CR# 938311. 2.8 sk 05/03/16 Standard Speed for SD to 19MHz in ZynqMPSoC. CR#951024 3.0 sk 06/09/16 Added support for mkfs to calculate sector count. sk 07/16/16 Added support for UHS modes. sk 07/07/16 Used usleep API for both arm and microblaze. sk 07/16/16 Added Tap delays accordingly to different SD/eMMC operating modes. 3.1 mi 09/07/16 Removed compilation warnings with extra compiler flags. sk 10/13/16 Reduced the delay during power cycle to 1ms as per spec sk 10/19/16 Used emmc_hwreset pin to reset eMMC. sk 11/07/16 Enable Rst_n bit in ext_csd reg if not enabled. 3.2 sk 11/30/16 Modified the voltage switching sequence as per spec. sk 02/01/17 Added HSD and DDR mode support for eMMC. vns 02/09/17 Added ARMA53_32 support for ZynqMP CR#968397 sk 03/20/17 Add support for EL1 non-secure mode. 3.3 mn 05/17/17 Add support for 64bit DMA addressing mn 07/17/17 Add support for running SD at 200MHz mn 07/26/17 Fixed compilation warnings mn 08/07/17 Modify driver to support 64-bit DMA in arm64 only mn 08/17/17 Added CCI support for A53 and disabled data cache operations when it is enabled. mn 08/22/17 Updated for Word Access System support mn 09/06/17 Resolved compilation errors with IAR toolchain mn 09/26/17 Added UHS_MODE_ENABLE macro to enable UHS mode 3.4 mn 10/17/17 Use different commands for single and multi block transfers mn 03/02/18 Move UHS macro check to SD card initialization routine 3.5 mn 04/18/18 Resolve compilation warnings for sdps driver 3.6 mn 07/06/18 Fix Cppcheck and Doxygen warnings for sdps driver mn 08/01/18 Add support for using 64Bit DMA with 32-Bit Processor mn 08/01/18 Add cache invalidation call before returning from ReadPolled API mn 08/14/18 Resolve compilation warnings for ARMCC toolchain mn 10/01/18 Change Expected Response for CMD3 to R1 for MMC mus 11/05/18 Support 64 bit DMA addresses for Microblaze-X platform. 3.7 mn 02/01/19 Add support for idling of SDIO aru 03/12/19 Modified the code according to MISRAC-2012. 3.8 mn 04/12/19 Modified TapDelay code for supporting ZynqMP and Versal mn 09/17/19 Modified ADMA handling API for 32bit and 64bit addresses 3.9 sd 02/07/20 Added clock support mn 03/03/20 Restructured the code for more readability and modularity mn 03/30/20 Return XST_DEVICE_IS_STARTED when host is already started mn 03/30/20 Move Clock enabling before checking for Host already started 3.10 mn 06/05/20 Check Transfer completion separately from XSdPs_Read and XSdPs_Write APIs mn 06/05/20 Modified code for SD Non-Blocking Read support 3.14 sk 10/22/21 Add support for Erase feature. mn 11/28/21 Fix MISRA-C violations. sk 01/10/22 Add support to read slot_type parameter. 4.0 sk 02/25/22 Add support for eMMC5.1. sk 04/07/22 Add support to read custom tap delay values from design for SD/eMMC. 4.2 ro 06/12/23 Added support for system device-tree flow. 4.3 ap 11/29/23 Add support for Sanitize feature. 4.5 sk 10/28/25 Update IsCacheCoherent logic to include EL1_NS mode.

detaileddescription.para: See xsdps.h for a detailed description of the device and driver.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
3.9 mn 03/03/20 Restructured the code for more readability and modularity mn 03/16/20 Move XSdPs_Select_Card API to User APIs 3.10 mn 06/05/20 Check Transfer completion separately from XSdPs_Read and XSdPs_Write APIs mn 10/15/20 Modify power cycle API to poll for SD bus lines to go low for versal platform 3.12 sk 01/28/21 Added support for non-blocking write. sk 02/12/21 Fix the issue in reading CID and CSD. 3.14 sk 10/22/21 Add support for Erase feature. mn 11/28/21 Fix MISRA-C violations. sk 01/10/22 Add support to read slot_type parameter. 4.0 sk 02/25/22 Add support for eMMC5.1. sk 04/07/22 Add support to read custom tap delay values from design for SD/eMMC. 4.1 sk 11/10/22 Add SD/eMMC Tap delay support for Versal Net. 4.1 sa 01/03/23 Report error if Transfer size is greater than 2MB. sa 01/04/23 Update register bit polling logic to use Xil_WaitForEvent/ Xil_WaitForEvents API. sa 01/25/23 Use instance structure to store DMA descriptor tables. 4.2 ap 08/09/23 reordered function XSdPs_Identify_UhsMode. 4.3 ap 12/22/23 Add support to read custom HS400 tap delay value from design for eMMC. 4.5 sk 10/28/25 Update IsCacheCoherent logic to include EL1_NS mode.

detaileddescription.para: Other driver functions are defined in xsdps.h.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
3.9 mn 03/03/20 Restructured the code for more readability and modularity mn 03/16/20 Move XSdPs_Select_Card API to User APIs 3.12 sk 01/28/21 Added support for non-blocking write. 3.14 sk 10/22/21 Add support for Erase feature. mn 11/28/21 Fix MISRA-C violations. 4.0 sk 02/25/22 Add support for eMMC5.1. 4.1 sa 01/06/23 Include xil_util.h in this file. 4.2 ap 08/09/23 Add XSdPs_SetTapDelay APIs.

Ver Who Date Changes
1.00a hk/sg 10/17/13 Initial release 3.6 mn 07/06/18 Add initialization macros in sdps mn 07/13/18 Add initializer macro for HasEMIO

detaileddescription.para: See xsdps.h for a detailed description of the device and driver.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
3.9 mn 03/03/20 Restructured the code for more readability and modularity mn 03/16/20 Add code to get card ID for MMC/eMMC 3.10 mn 07/09/20 Modified code to prevent removing pull up on D3 line mn 07/30/20 Read 16Bit value for Block Size Register 3.11 sk 12/01/20 Tap programming sequence updates like disable OTAPEN always, write zero to tap register for zero tap value. sk 12/17/20 Removed checking platform specific SD macros and used Baseaddress instead. 3.13 sk 08/10/21 Limit the SD operating frequency to 19MHz for Versal. 3.14 sk 10/22/21 Add support for Erase feature. mn 11/28/21 Fix MISRA-C violations. sk 01/10/22 Add support to read slot_type parameter. 4.0 sk 02/25/22 Add support for eMMC5.1. sk 04/07/22 Add support to read custom tap delay values from design for SD/eMMC. sk 06/03/22 Fix issue in internal clock divider calculation logic. 4.1 sk 11/10/22 Add SD/eMMC Tap delay support for Versal Net. sa 01/04/23 Update register bit polling logic to use Xil_WaitForEvent/ Xil_WaitForEvents API. sa 01/25/23 Use instance structure to store DMA descriptor tables. 4.2 ap 08/09/23 Restructured XSdPs_FrameCmd API 4.3 ap 12/22/23 Add support to read custom HS400 tap delay value from design for eMMC. 4.5 sk 10/28/25 Update IsCacheCoherent logic to include EL1_NS mode. 4.6 vlt 03/14/26 Updated BaseAddress type from u32 to UINTPTR to support 64-bit addressing.

detaileddescription.para: The xsdps_hw.h header file contains the identifiers and basic HW access driver functions (or macros) that can be used to access the device. Other driver functions are defined in xsdps.h.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00a hk/sg 10/17/13 Initial release 2.5 sg 07/09/15 Added SD 3.0 features kvn 07/15/15 Modified the code according to MISRAC-2012. 2.7 sk 12/10/15 Added support for MMC cards. sk 03/02/16 Configured the Tap Delay values for eMMC HS200 mode. 2.8 sk 04/20/16 Added new workaround for auto tuning. 3.0 sk 06/09/16 Added support for mkfs to calculate sector count. sk 07/16/16 Added support for UHS modes. sk 07/16/16 Added Tap delays accordingly to different SD/eMMC operating modes. 3.1 sk 11/07/16 Enable Rst_n bit in ext_csd reg if not enabled. 3.2 sk 03/20/17 Add support for EL1 non-secure mode. 3.3 mn 08/22/17 Updated for Word Access System support mn 09/06/17 Added support for ARMCC toolchain 3.4 mn 01/22/18 Separated out SDR104 and HS200 clock defines 3.6 mn 07/06/18 Fix Doxygen warnings for sdps driver 3.8 mn 04/12/19 Modified TapDelay code for supporting ZynqMP and Versal mn 05/21/19 Set correct tap delays for Versal mn 05/21/19 Disable DLL Reset code for Versal mn 07/03/19 Update Input Tap Delays for Versal 3.9 mn 03/03/20 Restructured the code for more readability and modularity 3.14 mn 11/28/21 Fix MISRA-C violations. 4.0 sk 02/25/22 Add support for eMMC5.1. sk 04/07/22 Fix typo in 'XSDPS_MMC_1_BIT_BUS_ARG' macro definition. 4.1 sk 11/10/22 Add SD/eMMC Tap delay support for Versal Net. 4.2 ro 06/12/23 Added support for system device-tree flow. 4.3 ap 11/29/23 Add support for Sanitize feature. 4.3 ap 12/22/23 Add support to read custom HS400 tap delay value from design for eMMC.

detaileddescription.para: See xsdps.h for a detailed description of the device and driver.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00a hk/sg 10/17/13 Initial release 2.1 hk 04/18/14 Increase sleep for eMMC switch command. Add sleep for microblaze designs. CR# 781117. 2.3 sk 09/23/14 Use XSdPs_Change_ClkFreq API whenever changing clock.CR# 816586. 2.5 sg 07/09/15 Added SD 3.0 features kvn 07/15/15 Modified the code according to MISRAC-2012. 2.7 sk 01/08/16 Added workaround for issue in auto tuning mode of SDR50, SDR104 and HS200. sk 02/16/16 Corrected the Tuning logic. sk 03/02/16 Configured the Tap Delay values for eMMC HS200 mode. 2.8 sk 04/20/16 Added new workaround for auto tuning. 3.0 sk 07/07/16 Used usleep API for both arm and microblaze. sk 07/16/16 Added support for UHS modes. sk 07/16/16 Added Tap delays accordingly to different SD/eMMC operating modes. 3.1 mi 09/07/16 Removed compilation warnings with extra compiler flags. sk 11/07/16 Enable Rst_n bit in ext_csd reg if not enabled. sk 11/16/16 Issue DLL reset at 31 iteration to load new zero value. 3.2 sk 02/01/17 Added HSD and DDR mode support for eMMC. sk 02/01/17 Consider bus width parameter from design for switching vns 02/09/17 Added ARMA53_32 support for ZynqMP CR#968397 vns 03/13/17 Fixed MISRAC mandatory violation sk 03/20/17 Add support for EL1 non-secure mode. 3.3 mn 07/25/17 Removed SD0_OTAPDLYENA and SD1_OTAPDLYENA bits mn 08/07/17 Properly set OTAPDLY value by clearing previous bit settings mn 08/17/17 Added CCI support for A53 and disabled data cache operations when it is enabled. mn 08/22/17 Updated for Word Access System support 3.4 mn 01/22/18 Separated out SDR104 and HS200 clock defines 3.6 mn 07/06/18 Fix Cppcheck warnings for sdps driver 3.7 aru 03/12/19 Modified the code according to MISRAC-2012. mn 03/27/19 Disable calls to dll_reset API for versal SPP Platforms 3.8 mn 04/12/19 Modified TapDelay code for supporting ZynqMP and Versal mn 05/21/19 Set correct tap delays for Versal mn 05/21/19 Disable DLL Reset code for Versal mn 08/29/19 Add call to Cache Invalidation API in XSdPs_Get_BusWidth 3.9 mn 03/03/20 Restructured the code for more readability and modularity mn 03/16/20 Move XSdPs_Select_Card API to User APIs 3.10 mn 06/05/20 Modified code for SD Non-Blocking Read support 3.12 sk 01/28/21 Added support for non-blocking write. 3.14 mn 11/28/21 Fix MISRA-C violations. 4.0 sk 02/25/22 Add support for eMMC5.1. 4.1 sk 11/10/22 Add SD/eMMC Tap delay support for Versal Net. 4.5 sk 10/28/25 Update IsCacheCoherent logic to include EL1_NS mode. 4.6 vlt 01/28/26 Fixed codespell issues

Ver Who Date Changes
1.00a hk/sg 10/17/13 Initial release kvn 07/15/15 Modified the code according to MISRAC-2012. 3.7 aru 03/12/19 Modified the code according to MISRAC-2012. 4.2 ro 06/12/23 Added support for system device-tree flow. 4.6 vlt 12/18/25 Update Doxygen comments to include SDT flow details. 4.6 vlt 03/14/26 Updated BaseAddress type from u32 to UINTPTR to support 64-bit addressing.
